spriteEditor.title: Sprite Editor
spriteEditor.description: Merge multiple sequence images into one sprite sheet with drag-and-drop import, folder import, column and padding controls, plus live preview and export.
spriteEditor.dropPrompt: Release to import images for merging

import.title: Image List
import.description: Files are naturally sorted by name, making it easy to merge character animations, expressions, or UI sprite assets.
import.dragCopy: Or click to select multiple images. Sequence folders are supported too.

list.empty: No images imported yet. Imported files and sizes will appear here.

emptyPreview.title: Drop multiple images or a whole folder here to import
emptyPreview.description: Import a full image sequence in one go. After importing, you can reorder frames directly in the preview before exporting the sprite sheet.

messages.noFiles: No image files were detected. Drop images or a folder to continue.
messages.unsupported: Only PNG, JPG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIF, TIFF, SVG, or AVIF images are supported.
messages.failed: Image loading failed. Please try another set of files.
messages.imported: Imported {imported} images and sorted them by name.
messages.importedWithSkipped: Imported {imported} images and skipped {skipped} unsupported files.
